note: Notable 2026 drops, partnerships and catalysts. The 'buzz' label is a qualitative read of collector attention (licensed-IP strength + Reddit/TikTok/trade coverage), NOT a measured ranking.

drops.name: Pokémon — Eevee Evolutions (yearlong campaign)
drops.what: Rotating limited Eevee-evolution plush across 2026–27 — Vaporeon, Jolteon and Flareon first, more chapters to follow.

drops.name: Bluey (with BBC Studios)
drops.what: Six characters in Mini Bean / Micro Mini Bean + full-size plush — sold through 1,500+ Walmarts as well as BBW.

drops.name: Walmart wholesale debut
drops.what: First-ever wholesale: Build-A-Bear plush now sold through Walmart (1,500+ stores) — a major new distribution channel beyond its own stores and site.

drops.name: Slushie Plushies + Summer 'Stuff You Love'
drops.what: First-ever wearable plush and a nostalgic summer-drinks line (Blue Raspberry Cow, Coconut Lime Koala, etc.) — expanding into new product formats.

drops.name: KABU plush line (series tie-in)
drops.what: Plush collection tied to the new KABU animated series — owned-IP merchandising launched alongside the show.

drops.name: 2026 U.S. Figure Skating Championships
drops.what: Official Plush & 'Tossie' of the 2026 Prevagen U.S. Figure Skating Championships (St. Louis, Jan 2026).

timeline_note: Screen releases are Build-A-Bear's most predictable attention-spike, and the calendar is known years out. The Grogu-plush boom after The Mandalorian is the template; the IF (Paramount) collab and BBW's own KABU series + Glisten film show it now runs the playbook on both licensed and owned IP. Below: upcoming releases for franchises BBW *already sells* — each is a re-hype + new-drop trigger. Dates are studio-confirmed.

timeline.title: The Mandalorian & Grogu — first feature film
timeline.why: Grogu / 'Baby Yoda' is one of BBW's biggest-ever licensed hits, and BBW already sells a 'Grogu Class of 2026' set. The franchise's first theatrical movie is the clearest near-term re-hype.
timeline.tag: Star Wars · BBW has the line

timeline.title: Pokémon — Eevee Evolutions yearlong campaign
timeline.why: Rotating limited Eevee-evolution drops across the whole year. Pokémon is BBW's single biggest collector-collab driver — each chapter is its own mini-catalyst.

timeline.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2 — live-action film
timeline.why: BBW sells Toothless & Light Fury. The 2025 live-action remake drove a demand spike; Universal has dated the sequel for summer 2027, setting up a repeat.

timeline.title: Hello Kitty — first theatrical movie (WB / New Line)
timeline.why: Sanrio is one of BBW's hottest collabs right now — Pochacco & Sanrio characters dominate r/buildabear's current top posts. A first-ever Hello Kitty feature film is a major future catalyst for that line.
